reviews.comment:
Lastima que hay que pagar para inflar las ruedas (y la maquina anda mas o menos) el espacio es muy reducido para ser una estacion aca con restoran. Las señales son muy confusas... hay flechas viejas para indicar la direccion pero hay un cartel de contramano para no entrar por ahi

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame you have to pay to inflate the tires (and the machine only works so-so). The space is very small for a station with a restaurant. The signs are very confusing... there are old arrows indicating the direction, but there's also a "one-way" sign to prevent you from entering that way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNJejd1emh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención de ruta. Se encuentran un poco de todo para picotear.

(Translated by Google)
Good roadside service. They have a bit of everything for snacking.

reviews.comment:

Good stop on Route 2. Coffee with milk like before. Different from gas stations... a more home-style lunch

reviews.comment:
Siempre que viajo paro para almorzar, muy buena atención y mercadería de calidad.
Destacó la higiene del lugar en su totalidad.
Buen lugar de estacionamiento y esparcimiento al aire libre.

(Translated by Google)
Whenever I travel, I stop for lunch. The service is excellent, and the food is high quality.
I was particularly impressed with the overall cleanliness of the place. There's also good parking and a pleasant outdoor area.
